violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The floors in the (kitchen, W/I coolers, and W/I freezer) are not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. Per PIC establishment is undergoing renovation. ETA for completion is end of May. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Observed an employee drinking from open beverage container in a food preparation area. Staff relocated open beverage container at time of inspection. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Observed soap not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar located in banquet room. PIC supplied soap at time of inspection. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, and tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. PIC moved slicers to ware-washing area to be washed, rinsed and sanitized at time of inspection. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Chicken prepped day before was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit in lowboy located at salad bar station. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Chicken was observed not marked with the date of preparation located in walk-cooler. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Observed establishment not following approved HACCP plan/procedures. Proper procedures/plan reviewed. Establishment must follow approved HACCP plan/procedures. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Observed insect control device stored next to Pasta cooking pot/food prep area in the kitchen. Insect control devices shall be installed so that the devices are not located over/next to a FOOD preparation area. PIC voluntarily discarded insect device at time of inspection. Insect control devices shall be installed so that: -The devices are not located over a FOOD preparation area; and -Dead insects and insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed FOOD, clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; and unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Observed several metal pans stacked on each other wet on drying rack at time of inspection. After cleaning and SANITIZING, EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS: -Shall be air-dried or used after adequate draining as specified in the before contact with FOOD; and -May not be cloth dried except that UTENSILS that have been air-dried may be polished with cloths that are maintained clean and dry. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Observed several cutting boards in the (3-bay sink area) are very scratched and scored. PIC discarded cutting board at time of inspection. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The following nonfood contact surfaces located in the (kitchen/commissary) area was not in good repair:-2 can opener blades-several knife handles New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

A few dumpsters outside is located on (gravel/rocks). The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Observed mop not being air dried located in commissary. PIC relocated mop to pair dry. After use, mops shall be placed in a position that allows them to be air-dry without soiling wall, equipment, or supplies. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The floors in the (kitchen, W/I coolers, and W/I freezer) are not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. Per PIC establishment is undergoing renovation. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The floors underneath shelving/equipment in the (kitchen) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The following utensils were observed improperly stored/used between uses: 1) Cups are being used in containers of food. Utensils used to dispense foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container 2) A scoop was observed stored in stagnant water between uses 3) Several knives were observed stored in unclean surface between equipment and wall Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

Mixing bowls were in poor repair (observed heavily pitted). PIC instructed to take equipment out of service. Per interview with PIC, new equipment has been ordered to replace existing equipment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicers have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
The floors throughout the facility were observed in poor repair (several area missing adequate grout). New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
